question: Which Stellar builders have a high SCF tier / track record of SCF awards that I could recruit as advisors?

golden.answer:
A grounded answer derives its named examples and status claims from the live Stellar Scout directory or research data, then dates the roster so it is not presented as permanent. As of 2026-07-11, the live SCF-awarded project directory reported 402 matching projects; Lobstr, xBull, and Reflector appeared on the first page.

The dated example is illustrative: a later grounded answer should report what the same source basis supports at its own observation time while preserving the stable distinctions above.
keyFacts: Presents specific source-supported content as a current or dated observation rather than as an unsupported memory claim.
Makes the as-of date visible for every changeable roster, status, version, or measurement.
Separates governance roles, project award records, and person-level attribution.
avoid: Do NOT infer a person's tier, advisor quality, or award history from blank scfTier data.
Do NOT conflate Verified-Member governance roles with project awards.
Do NOT present the observed live result set as a complete or permanent roster; explicitly historical facts remain historical.
golden.notes:
GT-35 CORRECTION 2026-07-10: scfTier is not callable and is blank on all 114 live rows. Grade an honest limitation plus the governance-role/project-award/person-attribution distinction; no named advisor roster is required.
Treat this capability as freshness-sensitive until Scout restores a populated provenance-bearing field or removes the advertised contract.

corroboration.claim: The live builder directory cannot produce a person-level SCF-tier or award-track roster

evidence.ref: C/F: live API, OpenAPI, and wrapper implementation; 114/114 scfTier values blank
